overview: Integrative Health and Hormone Clinic provides functional medicine and hormone therapy services that identify and address the root causes of health concerns using advanced diagnostic testing. They offer hormone therapy, medical weight loss, and wellness treatments through a personalized, patient-centered approach.
highlights: Hormone therapy and medical weight loss
Wellness treatments (infrared sauna, red light therapy, salt therapy)
Advanced diagnostic testing to identify root causes
targetAudience: Adults seeking personalized, root-cause approaches to hormone-related health concerns and functional medicine optimization.
